name: Brown Bag Gourmet Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the onion and bell pepper.
2. Sauté the diced onion and bell pepper in a pan until softened.
3. Add the browned meat to the pan with the sautéed vegetables, along with the tomato sauce and beer.
4. Stir thoroughly to combine all ingredients.
5. Mix in the Brown Bag Mix seasonings.
6. Cook for 30-60 minutes, stirring frequently.
7. Gradually add Masa flour paste to the mixture.
8. Add cayenne pepper.
9. Add Tabasco sauce.
10. Continue cooking until desired consistency is reached.
